vocab.example: 他报名参加了初级游泳班。
老师详细地讲解了这道数学题。
好朋友之间应该彼此信任。
这次失败使他变得更加坚强。
我们已经完成了基本的工作。
他感到胸口有些不舒服。
面对问题，我们不能躲闪。
他恨自己没有早点听话。
有病就要尽早去看医生。
两个人在地上扭打成一团。
今天气温下降到了零度。
图书馆的开放时间是早上九点至下午五点。
爸爸穿着一件干净的白衬衫。
他生气地瞪了对方一眼。

sentences.text: 常言道：“人非圣贤，孰能无过。”
sentences.description: As the saying goes, no one is perfect and everyone makes mistakes.

sentences.text: 我感到十分惭愧，真不应该动手打人。
sentences.description: Feeling deeply ashamed for resorting to physical violence.

sentences.text: 我急得像热锅上的蚂蚁，恨不得插上翅膀飞回家。
sentences.description: Anxious like ants on a hot pan, wishing for wings to fly home.

sentences.text: 我不应该在事情还没有水落石出之前，就急于下定论。
sentences.description: Should not jump to conclusions before the truth comes to light.

sentences.text: 考卷发下来后，我惊呆了，卷子上写着一个史无前例的低分。
sentences.description: Shocked after receiving an unprecedented low score on the exam.

初级.zh: 这门课程专门为初级学习者设计，不需要任何基础。
初级.en: This course is specially designed for beginner learners and does not require any background.

初级.zh: 他刚报名参加了一个初级游泳班，希望学会基本姿势。
初级.en: He just enrolled in a beginner swimming class, hoping to learn the basic postures.

初级.zh: 经过几个月的努力，她终于从初级班升到了中级班。
初级.en: After months of effort, she finally moved up from the beginner class to the intermediate class.

初级.zh: 这本初级汉语词典非常适合刚刚开始学中文的学生。
初级.en: This beginner Chinese dictionary is very suitable for students who have just started learning Chinese.

初级.zh: 我们需要先掌握初级知识，才能去挑战更难的题目。
初级.en: We need to master basic knowledge first before we can challenge harder problems.

详细.zh: 请你把昨天事情发生的经过详细地向大家说明一下。
详细.en: Please explain the process of what happened yesterday in detail to everyone.

详细.zh: 这份计划书写得非常详细，每一个步骤都标注得非常清楚。
详细.en: This plan is written very in detail, with every step clearly marked.

详细.zh: 医生对患者进行了详细的身体检查，以确定病因。
详细.en: The doctor conducted a detailed physical examination of the patient to determine the cause of the illness.

详细.zh: 出发前我们一定要制定一份详细的旅游攻略和路线。
详细.en: Before setting off, we must make a detailed travel guide and route.

详细.zh: 老师在课堂上详细地解答了同学们提出的每一个问题。
详细.en: The teacher answered every question raised by the students in detail in class.

彼此.zh: 好朋友之间应该互相信任，彼此尊重对方的想法。
彼此.en: Good friends should trust each other and mutually respect each other's ideas.

彼此.zh: 虽然他们很久没有见面，但彼此之间的感情依然很好。
彼此.en: Although they haven't met for a long time, the affection between them is still very good.

彼此.zh: 在交流的过程中，我们加深了对彼此文化背景的了解。
彼此.en: In the process of communication, we deepened our understanding of each other's cultural backgrounds.

彼此.zh: 遇到困难的时候，大家要互相帮助，彼此鼓励打气。
彼此.en: When encountering difficulties, everyone should help each other and encourage one another.

彼此.zh: 他们俩通过眼神交流，立刻明白了彼此心中的想法。
彼此.en: The two of them immediately understood what was on each other's minds through eye contact.

使.zh: 这次的失败使他彻底明白了坚持不懈的重要性。
使.en: This failure made him thoroughly understand the importance of perseverance.

使.zh: 科技的飞速发展使我们的日常生活变得越来越便利。
使.en: The rapid development of technology makes our daily life increasingly convenient.

使.zh: 老师温暖的关怀使做错事的他感到无比惭愧。
使.en: The teacher's warm care made him, who did wrong, feel incomparably ashamed.

使.zh: 适量的运动可以增强体质，使我们保持健康的体魄。
使.en: Moderate exercise can strengthen our physique and keep us in a healthy body.

使.zh: 精彩的表演使全场观众不由自主地报以热烈的掌声。
使.en: The brilliant performance made the audience whole-heartedly break into warm applause.

基本.zh: 学习一门新的语言，首先要掌握其基本的发音规则。
基本.en: To learn a new language, one must first master its basic pronunciation rules.

基本.zh: 这篇长文章的基本内容我已经看懂了，但细节还需要研究。
基本.en: I have already understood the basic content of this long article, but the details still need study.

基本.zh: 懂得礼貌待人是每一个学生都应该具备的基本素养。
基本.en: Knowing how to treat people with politeness is a basic quality that every student should possess.

基本.zh: 经过两个星期的修缮，这栋房屋的基本结构已经稳定了。
基本.en: After two weeks of repairs, the basic structure of this house has stabilized.

基本.zh: 只要掌握了最基本的方法，解决这个问题就会非常轻松。
基本.en: As long as you master the most basic method, solving this problem will be very easy.

胸口.zh: 他跑得太急了，停下来时感到胸口一阵剧烈地起伏。
胸口.en: He ran too fast and felt his chest heaving violently when he stopped.

胸口.zh: 看到孩子平安无事归来，她心里悬着的石头终于落到了胸口以下。
胸口.en: Seeing her child return safe and sound, the stone hanging in her heart finally dropped.

胸口.zh: 运动员双手紧贴胸口，面向国旗肃立并高唱国歌。
胸口.en: The athlete pressed his hands close to his chest, standing respectfully facing the national flag and singing the national anthem.

胸口.zh: 他感到胸口有些闷，于是走出门去呼吸新鲜空气。
胸口.en: He felt a bit tight in his chest, so he walked out the door to breathe fresh air.

胸口.zh: 小猫静静地躺在他的胸口上，发出舒服的咕噜声。
胸口.en: The kitten lay quietly on his chest, making a comfortable purring sound.

扣子.zh: 出门前，妈妈细心地帮他把衬衫上面的扣子全部扣好。
扣子.en: Before going out, mom carefully helped him button up all the buttons on his shirt.

扣子.zh: 在玩耍的过程中，他不小心把外套上的扣子给弄丢了。
扣子.en: While playing, he accidentally lost a button from his jacket.

扣子.zh: 这件外套的扣子设计得很别致，给衣服增添了美感。
扣子.en: The button design of this jacket is very unique, adding beauty to the clothing.

扣子.zh: 他低头一看，才发现自己慌忙中把扣子给扣错了位置。
扣子.en: Looking down, he realized that in his hurry, he had buttoned his shirt in the wrong place.

扣子.zh: 奶奶从针线盒里拿出备用扣子，帮他把掉落的扣子缝好。
扣子.en: Grandma took out a spare button from the sewing box and helped him sew on the fallen button.

扑.zh: 可爱的小狗一看到主人回家，就兴奋地扑了上去。
扑.en: As soon as the cute puppy saw its owner come home, it jumped up excitedly.

扑.zh: 一走进厨房，一股浓郁而诱人的香味就扑鼻而来。
扑.en: As soon as one walks into the kitchen, a rich and inviting aroma rushes to one's nose.

扑.zh: 面对汹涌而来的风浪，救援人员勇敢地扑向危险现场。
扑.en: Facing the surging wind and waves, rescuers bravely threw themselves into the dangerous scene.

扑.zh: 调皮的小猫猛地向前方飞舞的蝴蝶扑了过去。
扑.en: The playful cat pounced fiercely towards the butterfly dancing ahead.

扑.zh: 消防员们手拿着灭火器，迅速扑灭了草坪上的火苗。
扑.en: Holding fire extinguishers, firefighters quickly put out the flames on the lawn.

有限.zh: 人的生命是有限的，但我们可以创造无限的社会价值。
有限.en: Human life is limited, but we can create infinite social value.

有限.zh: 由于图书馆里的座位数量有限，大家都早早去排队。
有限.en: Because the number of seats in the library is limited, everyone went early to queue up.

有限.zh: 我们的个人精力和时间有限，必须学会合理安排。
有限.en: Our personal energy and time are limited, so we must learn to arrange them reasonably.

有限.zh: 这种限量版的运动鞋发售数量极其有限，非常难买到。
有限.en: The release quantity of this limited edition sneaker is extremely limited and very hard to buy.

有限.zh: 在资源有限的情况下，我们更应该懂得节约和共享。
有限.en: Under conditions of limited resources, we should be all the more knowledgeable about saving and sharing.

躲闪.zh: 面对老师质问的目光，做错事的他眼神不停地躲闪。
躲闪.en: Faced with the teacher's questioning eyes, the wrongdoer's eyes kept flinching and dodging.

躲闪.zh: 飞来的足球速度极快，他灵敏地向旁边躲闪开来。
躲闪.en: The incoming football was extremely fast, and he agilely dodged to the side.

躲闪.zh: 在辩论比赛中，面对对手的提问，他没有做任何躲闪。
躲闪.en: In the debate competition, facing the opponent's questions, he did not dodge at all.

躲闪.zh: 小兔子警惕地观察四周，一有风吹草动就立刻躲闪。
躲闪.en: The little rabbit watched its surroundings vigilantly, dodging immediately at the slightest sign of wind or grass movement.

躲闪.zh: 面对生活中的困难与挑战，我们绝不能选择躲闪和逃避。
躲闪.en: In the face of difficulties and challenges in life, we must never choose to dodge and escape.

狠狠.zh: 因为没有按时交作业，他被严厉的老师狠狠地批评了一顿。
狠狠.en: Because he did not hand in his homework on time, he was harshly criticized by his strict teacher.

狠狠.zh: 在摔跤比赛中，他把对手狠狠地摔在了比赛垫子上。
狠狠.en: In the wrestling match, he slammed his opponent hard onto the competition mat.

狠狠.zh: 下定决心之后，他狠狠地打磨自己的技术，终于取得了成功。
狠狠.en: After making up his mind, he polished his skills relentlessly and finally achieved success.

狠狠.zh: 看到不守规矩的人，他狠狠地瞪了对方一眼表示愤怒。
狠狠.en: Seeing an unruly person, he glared fiercely at the opponent to express anger.

狠狠.zh: 他咬紧牙关，狠狠地踏下脚踏车，冲过了终点线。
狠狠.en: He gritted his teeth and pedaled the bicycle fiercely, crossing the finish line.

恨.zh: 我非常恨自己为什么没有在考试前更加认真地复习。
恨.en: I hate myself so much for not revising more conscientiously before the exam.

恨.zh: 遇到这种不公道的事情，每个人心里都充满了愤恨。
恨.en: Encountering such an unfair matter, everyone's heart was filled with resentment.

恨.zh: 看到光阴白白流逝，他恨不得时间能够倒流重新来过。
恨.en: Seeing time pass in vain, he wished that time could turn back and start over.

恨.zh: 老师对我们要求非常严格，真是爱之深、恨之切啊。
恨.en: The teacher demands very strictly of us; it really is a case of "tough love".

恨.zh: 他因为自己的粗心大意弄丢了重要物品，心中恨透了自己。
恨.en: He hated himself deeply in his heart because his own carelessness caused him to lose an important item.

尽早.zh: 如果你身体感到不舒服，一定要尽早去医院看医生。
尽早.en: If you feel unwell, you must go to the hospital to see a doctor as soon as possible.

尽早.zh: 请大家尽早提交申请表格，以便工作人员进行审核。
尽早.en: Please submit the application form as early as possible so that staff can conduct a review.

尽早.zh: 为了不耽误行程，我们明天早上必须尽早出发前往机场。
尽早.en: In order not to delay the trip, we must depart for the airport as early as possible tomorrow morning.

尽早.zh: 发现错误之后应该尽早改正，以免造成更加严重的后果。
尽早.en: After discovering an error, it should be corrected as early as possible to avoid more serious consequences.

尽早.zh: 希望相关部门能够尽早修好这条破损严重的小公路。
尽早.en: Hope the relevant departments can repair this seriously damaged small road as soon as possible.

扭打.zh: 这两个人因为一点小矛盾，竟然在街头扭打了起来。
扭打.en: Over a minor conflict, these two actually started scuffling and fighting in the street.

扭打.zh: 看到有两名男子在路边扭打，路人立刻拨打电话报警。
扭打.en: Seeing two men scuffling by the roadside, a passerby immediately dialed the police.

扭打.zh: 勇敢的警察在与歹徒扭打的过程中，成功地夺下了凶器。
扭打.en: In the process of wrestling with the thug, the brave police officer successfully seized the weapon.

扭打.zh: 老师及时赶到并制止了正在课室里相互扭打的学生。
扭打.en: The teacher arrived in time and stopped the students who were wrestling with each other in the classroom.

扭打.zh: 在电影的结尾部分，男主角与反派展开了一场激烈的扭打。
扭打.en: In the ending part of the movie, the male lead and the antagonist engaged in a fierce physical struggle.

零.zh: 今天的气温跌破了零度，户外刮起了冷冽的寒风。
零.en: Today's temperature plummeted below zero, and cold winds blew outdoors.

零.zh: 如果不从零开始努力，你就很难在新的领域取得突破。
零.en: If you don't start working hard from zero, it will be very difficult to achieve breakthroughs in a new field.

零.zh: 经过核查，这次数学考试全班居然没有一个人得零分。
零.en: After checking, surprisingly not a single person in the whole class got a zero in this math test.

零.zh: 倒计时归零的瞬间，夜空中绽放出了绚丽多彩的烟花。
零.en: The moment the countdown hit zero, brilliant and colorful fireworks bloomed in the night sky.

零.zh: 我们必须把一切顾虑归零，全身心地投入到工作中。
零.en: We must reset all misgivings to zero and devote ourselves wholeheartedly to our work.

至.zh: 这家书店的营业时间是从早上九点至晚上十点整。
至.en: The business hours of this bookstore are from nine in the morning until ten at night.

至.zh: 这次研讨会的参会人员涵盖了从初学者至高级专家。
至.en: Participants in this seminar covered everyone from beginners to senior experts.

至.zh: 他从幼年时代至成年时期，一直都保持着阅读的好习惯。
至.en: From his childhood to adulthood, he always maintained the good habit of reading.

至.zh: 气象局预测本周气温将升至三十摄氏度以上。
至.en: The meteorological bureau predicts that temperatures will rise to above thirty degrees Celsius this week.

至.zh: 从古至今，无数爱国志士为了国家的发展做出了牺牲。
至.en: From ancient times to the present, countless patriots have made sacrifices for the country's development.

衬衫.zh: 他今天穿着一件干净整洁的白色衬衫去参加面试。
衬衫.en: He wore a clean and tidy white shirt to the interview today.

衬衫.zh: 这件棉质衬衫穿起来非常透气而且十分舒适。
衬衫.en: This cotton shirt feels very breathable and extremely comfortable when worn.

衬衫.zh: 妈妈用熨斗把这件有些褶皱的衬衫熨烫得十分平整。
衬衫.en: Mom used an iron to iron this somewhat wrinkled shirt very flat.

衬衫.zh: 他习惯性地把衬衫的袖子卷起来，开始埋头认真工作。
衬衫.en: He habitually rolled up his shirt sleeves and buried his head to start working earnestly.

衬衫.zh: 这条领带和你的浅蓝色衬衫搭配起来看起来非常得体。
衬衫.en: This tie matches your light blue shirt and looks very appropriate.

瞪.zh: 看到弟弟又在偷吃零食，姐姐生气地瞪了他一眼。
瞪.en: Seeing her younger brother sneaking snacks again, the elder sister glared at him angrily.

瞪.zh: 听到这个出人意料的消息，他惊讶得瞪大了双眼。
瞪.en: Hearing this unexpected news, he stared with wide eyes in astonishment.

瞪.zh: 遇到任何困难时，我们都不能只是干瞪眼而不采取行动。
瞪.en: When encountering any difficulty, we shouldn't just stare helplessly without taking action.

瞪.zh: 那个陌生人用极其凶狠的眼神瞪着过往的每一个行人。
瞪.en: That stranger glared at every passing pedestrian with an extremely fierce look.

瞪.zh: 老师严厉地瞪了正在开小差的学生，示意他认真听课。
瞪.en: The teacher glared sternly at the student who was distracted, signaling him to listen carefully.
